headline: ₹200-500 Cr at risk (routine capex scale for large power contracts) — Adani Power secures 2,500 MW clean energy deal from MSEDCL, boosting stock and ESG positioning
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD reporting; non-disclosure risks SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
No immediate P/E rerating; structural upside if ESG disclosure and execution improve.
Potential for lower cost of capital via green financing; aligns with EU Taxonomy and CDP frameworks.
